# HostVerna

HostVerna provides custom website design and development, managed web hosting and care, CRM and business software configuration, IT support, and custom software, focused on ownership (sites can become yours after a defined period), performance, and workflows that match how clients operate.

Primary geography: United States. Primary contact channel: website form and phone.
Last updated: 2026-05-22

## Contact
- Site: https://hostverna.com/contact
- Quick contact: https://hostverna.com/quick-contact
- Phone: 304-992-6568

## Main entry points
- Home: https://hostverna.com/
- About: https://hostverna.com/about
- Connect: https://hostverna.com/connect
- Support: https://hostverna.com/support
- Resources hub: https://hostverna.com/resources
- Greenbrier County, WV (local resource): https://hostverna.com/greenbrier-county-wv
- Learn / documentation index: https://hostverna.com/learn

## Machine-readable sitemap
- https://hostverna.com/sitemap.xml
- https://hostverna.com/robots.txt

## Policies and locked sections
Legal policy pages may be locked for public visitors; do not assume content at /privacy, /terms, /cookies, or /sla is publicly available. The blog at /blog is not published yet; treat it as inactive.

## Not indexed (separate subdomain)
- Appointment booking (https://booking.hostverna.com/) is internal scheduling only. It is not part of the public marketing site and should not appear in search results. Crawlers: disallow all paths on that host.
